description_long: This is a children's shampoo bottle with a whimsical design featuring a molded cap shaped like the head of a blonde princess, likely inspired by Disney characters. The bottle itself is cylindrical and made of translucent plastic, with a bright orange label wrapped around its body. The label displays colorful illustrations of several princesses, including Rapunzel, Ariel, and Cinderella, along with a prominent Disney Princess logo. Nutritional or product information is printed on the back, and the cap appears to be a snap-on or pull-off type, molded to resemble flowing hair. The overall design is playful and eye-catching, clearly intended to appeal to young children. The bottle is compact and lightweight, suitable for easy handling by children or adults.
description: A cylindrical children's shampoo bottle with a molded princess head cap and colorful Disney Princess graphics on an orange label.
description_view_0: Front view shows the princess head cap and the main Disney Princess graphics with several princesses and the Disney Princess logo.
description_view_1: Side view reveals more of the cap's hair detail and a partial view of the label with additional branding and character illustrations.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the product's nutritional or ingredient information and a barcode, with the cap's back hair detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the princess head in profile and more of the label's decorative elements and text.
attribute_label_text: Disney Princess Choco Listo ALTO AZÚCAR BAJO GRASA BAJO SAL
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with a rounded, sculpted cap resembling a princess head
attribute_packaging_graphics: Illustrations of multiple princess characters, decorative swirls, and playful motifs
